medications.name: BPC-157
medications.description: BPC-157 Therapy offers cutting-edge treatment designed to support healing, recovery, and overall wellness.
medications.indication: BPC-157 therapy promotes tissue repair, reduces inflammation, and enhances recovery from injuries or physical strain.

medications.name: GHK-Cu Peptide Treatment
medications.description: GHK-Cu Peptide is a powerful tripeptide bonded with copper ions, known for its ability to stimulate collagen production, support tissue repair, and combat signs of aging. Backed by decades of scientific research, GHK-Cu is safe for all skin types and a key component in anti-aging and regenerative treatments.
medications.indication: Clinically researched, it improves skin elasticity, reduces wrinkles, balances pigmentation, and promotes hair follicle repair for thicker, healthier hair. Additionally, it accelerates wound healing, reduces inflammation, and strengthens antioxidant defenses, making it ideal for post-procedure recovery and calming irritated skin.

medications.name: NAD+
medications.description: NAD+ (Nicotinamide Adenine Dinucleotide) is a vital coenzyme found in every cell of the body that plays a central role in energy production, cellular repair, and mitochondrial function. It is essential for converting nutrients into ATP (cellular energy) and supports critical processes like DNA repair, oxidative stress regulation, and aging-related resilience. NAD+ levels naturally decline with age, stress, illness, and environmental exposure, which may contribute to fatigue, cognitive decline, metabolic issues, and neurodegeneration.
medications.indication: Supports cellular energy production, mitochondrial function, and healthy aging. It may be used to assist in the management of fatigue, cognitive decline, neurodegenerative conditions, detoxification, and metabolic dysfunction, particularly in individuals experiencing stress-related depletion, chronic illness, or age-related decline in NAD+ levels.

medications.name: Selank
medications.description: A synthetic peptide developed as an analog of the naturally occurring immunomodulatory peptide tuftsin. Selank exhibits pronounced anxiolytic (anti-anxiety) effects without the sedative and dependency side effects commonly associated with traditional tranquilizers. Additionally, it has demonstrated nootropic properties, enhancing cognitive functions such as memory and learning.
medications.indication: Selank is used to support anxiety relief, cognitive enhancement, and stress management. This synthetic peptide promotes a calming effect without sedation, improves memory and focus, and helps regulate the body's stress response for overall mental well-being.

medications.name: SS-31 (Elamipretide)
medications.description: SS-31 (Elamipretide) is a cutting-edge mitochondrial peptide with wide-ranging benefits in cellular energy, aging, inflammation, and neuroprotection. By targeting and stabilizing mitochondrial membranes, it holds unique promise for individuals dealing with chronic fatigue, inflammation, autoimmune conditions, or degenerative diseases.
medications.indication: Indicated for any condition driven by mitochondrial dysfunction, especially where oxidative stress, energy failure, or age-related decline are involved. While still investigational, it is gaining popularity in integrative medicine, anti-aging, neurodegenerative care, and fatigue recovery protocols due to its direct mitochondrial repair mechanism.

medications.name: TB-400 / TB-500
medications.description: TB-400/500 is a synthetic fragment of thymosin beta-4 (specifically the 17-23 segment), designed to replicate its active region. Both are involved in actin regulation and tissue repair. TB-500 Therapy provides advanced treatment designed to enhance recovery, promote healing, and support overall physical performance.
medications.indication: TB-400/500 therapy helps reduce inflammation, accelerate tissue repair, and improve endurance, making it an ideal choice for those seeking optimal recovery and resilience.

medications.name: LR3 IGF-1
medications.description: LR3 IGF-1 (Long R3 Insulin-like Growth Factor 1) is a synthetic analog of IGF-1 with a modified amino acid sequence that significantly increases its stability and bioavailability. Unlike native IGF-1, LR3 IGF-1 resists binding to IGF-binding proteins, allowing for a prolonged half-life and more potent biological activity. It activates IGF-1 receptors to stimulate muscle growth, tissue repair, and cellular regeneration, while also enhancing nutrient uptake and improving insulin sensitivity. Due to its powerful anabolic properties, LR3 IGF-1 is commonly researched in the contexts of performance enhancement, anti-aging, and recovery optimization.
medications.indication: Promotes muscle hypertrophy, accelerates recovery, and supports tissue regeneration by activating IGF-1 receptors and increasing protein synthesis. Its resistance to IGF-binding proteins makes it ideal for protocols involving muscle growth, injury recovery, metabolic enhancement, and cellular repair.

supplements.name: Health Essential Bundle (Multi, Vitamin D, Omega)
supplements.description: Support your health with this essential trio: Vitamin D3 + K2 for strong bones, immunity, and mood balance, a high-quality multivitamin to fill nutritional gaps, and Omega-3s for heart, brain, and anti-inflammatory support. Optimize your wellness with these foundational nutrients!
supplements.indication: Designed to support bone strength, immune function, heart health, and overall vitality.

medications.name: Low Dose Naltrexone (LDN)
medications.description: Low Dose Naltrexone (LDN) is a compounded formulation of naltrexone, an opioid receptor antagonist, typically dosed between 0.5 mg and 4.5 mg. Unlike standard naltrexone dosing used for addiction treatment, LDN works by transiently blocking opioid receptors, leading to a rebound increase in endogenous endorphin and enkephalin production. This modulation of the immune system and inflammation pathways has shown therapeutic benefits in a range of chronic conditions.
medications.indication: Indicated for the management of autoimmune disorders, chronic pain syndromes, and inflammatory conditions. It is particularly beneficial for conditions such as multiple sclerosis, rheumatoid arthritis, Hashimoto’s thyroiditis, fibromyalgia, or irritable bowel syndrome. LDN helps reduce systemic inflammation, modulate immune responses, and improve symptom control, with potential neuroprotective and mood-enhancing effects.

medications.name: Compounded T3/T4 Thyroid Medication
medications.description: Compounded T3/T4 is a customized thyroid hormone medication containing a specific ratio of liothyronine (T3) and levothyroxine (T4), formulated by a compounding pharmacy to meet individual patient needs when commercially available options are not ideal.
medications.indication: Indicated for the treatment of hypothyroidism in patients requiring a personalized ratio of T3 and T4 to restore optimal thyroid function. It is beneficial for individuals who do not respond adequately to T4-only therapy, experience persistent hypothyroid symptoms, or need a formulation free of allergens or specific excipients.

medications.name: MOTS-c
medications.description: MOTS-c is a mitochondrial-derived peptide composed of 16 amino acids, encoded within the mitochondrial genome. It regulates metabolic homeostasis, cellular energy production, and mitochondrial function by activating AMPK (AMP-activated protein kinase), a critical energy-sensing enzyme involved in cellular metabolism, insulin sensitivity, fat oxidation, and glucose uptake.
medications.indication: Supports metabolic health, enhances mitochondrial function, and improves energy production. Indicated for patients with metabolic dysfunction, insulin resistance, weight loss resistance, or chronic fatigue. MOTS-c improves glucose utilization, increases fat oxidation, reduces inflammation, and supports healthy aging and exercise recovery.

medications.name: PT-141 (Bremelanotide)
medications.description: PT-141 (Bremelanotide) is a synthetic peptide used to enhance sexual arousal and libido in both men and women. Unlike other sexual function medications that target blood flow (like Viagra), PT-141 acts directly on the central nervous system, specifically the hypothalamus, to stimulate desire.
medications.indication: Treatment of hypoactive sexual desire disorder (HSDD) in premenopausal women and is used off-label in both men and women to enhance libido, arousal, and sexual satisfaction. In functional medicine, it is commonly prescribed for individuals experiencing low sexual desire, erectile dysfunction, or arousal difficulties, including those related to SSRI use or hormonal imbalance.

medications.name: Selank
medications.description: A synthetic peptide developed as an analog of the naturally occurring immunomodulatory peptide tuftsin. Selank exhibits pronounced anxiolytic (anti-anxiety) effects without the sedative and dependency side effects commonly associated with traditional tranquilizers. Additionally, it has demonstrated nootropic properties, enhancing cognitive functions such as memory and learning.
medications.indication: Selank is used to support anxiety relief, cognitive enhancement, and stress management. This synthetic peptide promotes a calming effect without sedation, improves memory and focus, and helps regulate the body's stress response for overall mental well-being.

medications.name: TB-400 / TB-500
medications.description: TB-400/500 is a synthetic fragment of thymosin beta-4 (specifically the 17-23 segment), designed to replicate its active region. Both are involved in actin regulation and tissue repair. TB-500 Therapy provides advanced treatment designed to enhance recovery, promote healing, and support overall physical performance.
medications.indication: TB-400/500 therapy helps reduce inflammation, accelerate tissue repair, and improve endurance, making it an ideal choice for those seeking optimal recovery and resilience.

medications.indication: Achieve targeted fat loss and enhanced metabolic health with Tesamorelin. Known for its ability to reduce stubborn visceral fat, it supports improved body composition, muscle definition, and energy.

medications.name: NAD+
medications.description: NAD+ (Nicotinamide Adenine Dinucleotide) is a vital coenzyme found in every cell of the body that plays a central role in energy production, cellular repair, and mitochondrial function. It is essential for converting nutrients into ATP (cellular energy) and supports critical processes like DNA repair, oxidative stress regulation, and aging-related resilience. NAD+ levels naturally decline with age, stress, illness, and environmental exposure, which may contribute to fatigue, cognitive decline, metabolic issues, and neurodegeneration.
medications.indication: Supports cellular energy production, mitochondrial function, and healthy aging. It may be used to assist in the management of fatigue, cognitive decline, neurodegenerative conditions, detoxification, and metabolic dysfunction, particularly in individuals experiencing stress-related depletion, chronic illness, or age-related decline in NAD+ levels.

medications.name: Selank
medications.description: A synthetic peptide developed as an analog of the naturally occurring immunomodulatory peptide tuftsin. Selank exhibits pronounced anxiolytic (anti-anxiety) effects without the sedative and dependency side effects commonly associated with traditional tranquilizers. Additionally, it has demonstrated nootropic properties, enhancing cognitive functions such as memory and learning.
medications.indication: Selank is used to support anxiety relief, cognitive enhancement, and stress management. This synthetic peptide promotes a calming effect without sedation, improves memory and focus, and helps regulate the body's stress response for overall mental well-being.

medications.name: NAD+
medications.description: NAD+ (Nicotinamide Adenine Dinucleotide) is a vital coenzyme found in every cell of the body that plays a central role in energy production, cellular repair, and mitochondrial function. It is essential for converting nutrients into ATP (cellular energy) and supports critical processes like DNA repair, oxidative stress regulation, and aging-related resilience. NAD+ levels naturally decline with age, stress, illness, and environmental exposure, which may contribute to fatigue, cognitive decline, metabolic issues, and neurodegeneration.
medications.indication: Supports cellular energy production, mitochondrial function, and healthy aging. It may be used to assist in the management of fatigue, cognitive decline, neurodegenerative conditions, detoxification, and metabolic dysfunction, particularly in individuals experiencing stress-related depletion, chronic illness, or age-related decline in NAD+ levels.

medications.name: BPC-157
medications.description: BPC-157 Therapy offers cutting-edge treatment designed to support healing, recovery, and overall wellness.
medications.indication: BPC-157 therapy promotes tissue repair, reduces inflammation, and enhances recovery from injuries or physical strain.

medications.name: Low Dose Naltrexone (LDN)
medications.description: Low Dose Naltrexone (LDN) is a compounded formulation of naltrexone, an opioid receptor antagonist, typically dosed between 0.5 mg and 4.5 mg. Unlike standard naltrexone dosing used for addiction treatment, LDN works by transiently blocking opioid receptors, leading to a rebound increase in endogenous endorphin and enkephalin production. This modulation of the immune system and inflammation pathways has shown therapeutic benefits in a range of chronic conditions.
medications.indication: Indicated for the management of autoimmune disorders, chronic pain syndromes, and inflammatory conditions. It is particularly beneficial for conditions such as multiple sclerosis, rheumatoid arthritis, Hashimoto’s thyroiditis, fibromyalgia, or irritable bowel syndrome. LDN helps reduce systemic inflammation, modulate immune responses, and improve symptom control, with potential neuroprotective and mood-enhancing effects.

medications.name: Oral BPC-KPV
medications.description: Oral BPC-KPV is a peptide-based therapy that combines BPC-157, known for its regenerative and anti-inflammatory properties, with KPV, a potent tripeptide derived from alpha-melanocyte-stimulating hormone (α-MSH) that helps modulate immune response and reduce inflammation. This combination is designed to support gut health, tissue repair, and immune regulation, making it a promising option for individuals with gastrointestinal disorders, inflammatory conditions, and musculoskeletal injuries.
medications.indication: Oral BPC-KPV is indicated for individuals seeking support for gut health, immune modulation, and tissue repair. It is commonly used for conditions such as inflammatory bowel diseases (IBD), leaky gut syndrome, gastritis, and other gastrointestinal disorders, as well as chronic inflammation and musculoskeletal injuries. By reducing inflammation, promoting cellular repair, and enhancing gut barrier integrity, BPC-KPV may aid in recovery from injury, optimize gut function, and support overall systemic healing.

medications.name: Progesterone
medications.description: Progesterone Therapy provides a personalized solution to support hormonal balance, improve mood, and enhance overall well-being.
medications.indication: Progesterone therapy helps regulate cycles, reduce stress, and promote optimal hormonal health.

medications.description: An injectable form of testosterone replacement therapy that delivers consistent hormone levels.
medications.indication: A powerful, direct approach to optimizing testosterone for peak strength, vitality, and a leaner physique.

supplements.name: Quercetin
supplements.description:
A plant flavonoid found in foods like onions, apples, berries, and capers. Often used for its mast cell stabilizing and anti-inflammatory properties.
Quercetin May Help By:
1. Mast Cell Stabilization

Helps reduce histamine release and inflammatory signaling.

2. Lowering Inflammation

Useful when CRP or inflammatory burden is elevated.

3. Antioxidant Support

Can help reduce stress-related oxidative load.

4. Histamine-Related Sleep Disturbance
supplements.indication:
Typical Use
500 mg once or twice daily with food
Often paired with vitamin C

tests.name: Men's TRT Treatment Follow-Up Panel
tests.description: A targeted follow-up panel designed for men undergoing hormone therapy, tracking key changes in testosterone and overall health.
tests.indication: Measures Free & Total Testosterone, Estradiol, PSA, CBC, and Metabolic Panel.

medications.name: BPC-157
medications.description: BPC-157 Therapy offers cutting-edge treatment designed to support healing, recovery, and overall wellness.
medications.indication: BPC-157 therapy promotes tissue repair, reduces inflammation, and enhances recovery from injuries or physical strain.

medications.name: Enclomiphene
medications.description: A selective estrogen receptor modulator (SERM) used to increase testosterone production in men by stimulating the natural production of luteinizing hormone (LH) and follicle-stimulating hormone (FSH).
medications.indication: A powerful testosterone booster that enhances natural production while supporting fertility. Unlike traditional options, Enclomiphene helps maintain testicular function and sperm count, ensuring optimized hormone levels without compromising reproductive health.

medications.name: Ezetimibe
medications.description: Ezetimibe is a cholesterol-lowering medication that significantly reduces LDL-C while boosting HDL-C, offering additional protective benefits for heart health, non-alcoholic fatty liver disease, and stroke prevention. It also helps lower inflammation by reducing CRP levels, supporting overall cardiovascular wellness.
medications.indication: Lowers bad cholesterol (LDL-C), raises good cholesterol (HDL-C), and supports heart and liver health while reducing inflammation.

medications.name: Metformin
medications.description: Metformin is a widely used oral medication primarily prescribed for managing type 2 diabetes. It works by improving insulin sensitivity, reducing glucose production in the liver, and enhancing glucose uptake by the body’s cells, effectively lowering blood sugar levels.
medications.indication: Metformin has been studied for its potential benefits in weight management, cardiovascular health, and even anti-aging applications. Its long-standing safety profile and effectiveness make it a cornerstone treatment for metabolic health under the guidance of a healthcare provider.

medications.name: TB-400 / TB-500
medications.description: TB-400/500 is a synthetic fragment of thymosin beta-4 (specifically the 17-23 segment), designed to replicate its active region. Both are involved in actin regulation and tissue repair. TB-500 Therapy provides advanced treatment designed to enhance recovery, promote healing, and support overall physical performance.
medications.indication: TB-400/500 therapy helps reduce inflammation, accelerate tissue repair, and improve endurance, making it an ideal choice for those seeking optimal recovery and resilience.

medications.name: Thymosin Alpha-1 (TA-1)
medications.description: Thymosin Alpha-1 (TA-1) is an immune-modulating peptide derived from the thymus that helps regulate and rebalance immune function rather than simply stimulating it. It enhances T-cell activity, improves immune surveillance, and modulates inflammatory signaling, making it particularly useful in states of immune dysregulation. In the gut, it supports the gut-associated immune system (GALT), helping reduce inappropriate immune reactions to microbes and food antigens while creating a more favorable environment for mucosal healing and microbiome balance.
medications.indication: TA-1 is best indicated in patients with chronic, immune-driven gut dysfunction—such as intestinal permeability (“leaky gut”), dysbiosis, SIBO recurrence, or inflammatory bowel conditions—especially when there is a pattern of persistent inflammation alongside poor pathogen clearance. It is most useful in conjunction or when gut issues are not resolving with standard antimicrobial and repair protocols, suggesting underlying immune imbalance that requires modulation to restore resilience and prevent relapse.

medications.name: GHK-Cu Peptide Treatment
medications.description: GHK-Cu Peptide is a powerful tripeptide bonded with copper ions, known for its ability to stimulate collagen production, support tissue repair, and combat signs of aging. Backed by decades of scientific research, GHK-Cu is safe for all skin types and a key component in anti-aging and regenerative treatments.
medications.indication: Clinically researched, it improves skin elasticity, reduces wrinkles, balances pigmentation, and promotes hair follicle repair for thicker, healthier hair. Additionally, it accelerates wound healing, reduces inflammation, and strengthens antioxidant defenses, making it ideal for post-procedure recovery and calming irritated skin.

medications.name: Glutathione

medications.name: Low Dose Naltrexone (LDN)
medications.description: Low Dose Naltrexone (LDN) is a compounded formulation of naltrexone, an opioid receptor antagonist, typically dosed between 0.5 mg and 4.5 mg. Unlike standard naltrexone dosing used for addiction treatment, LDN works by transiently blocking opioid receptors, leading to a rebound increase in endogenous endorphin and enkephalin production. This modulation of the immune system and inflammation pathways has shown therapeutic benefits in a range of chronic conditions.
medications.indication: Indicated for the management of autoimmune disorders, chronic pain syndromes, and inflammatory conditions. It is particularly beneficial for conditions such as multiple sclerosis, rheumatoid arthritis, Hashimoto’s thyroiditis, fibromyalgia, or irritable bowel syndrome. LDN helps reduce systemic inflammation, modulate immune responses, and improve symptom control, with potential neuroprotective and mood-enhancing effects.

medications.name: MOTS-c
medications.description: MOTS-c is a mitochondrial-derived peptide composed of 16 amino acids, encoded within the mitochondrial genome. It regulates metabolic homeostasis, cellular energy production, and mitochondrial function by activating AMPK (AMP-activated protein kinase), a critical energy-sensing enzyme involved in cellular metabolism, insulin sensitivity, fat oxidation, and glucose uptake.
medications.indication: Supports metabolic health, enhances mitochondrial function, and improves energy production. Indicated for patients with metabolic dysfunction, insulin resistance, weight loss resistance, or chronic fatigue. MOTS-c improves glucose utilization, increases fat oxidation, reduces inflammation, and supports healthy aging and exercise recovery.

medications.name: Zinc Thymulin + GHK-Cu Topical Solution
medications.description: This compounded topical combines zinc thymulin, a bioactive peptide complex that supports immune signaling and tissue regulation, with GHK-Cu (copper peptide), a well-studied regenerative peptide known for its role in skin remodeling, wound healing, and hair follicle stimulation. Delivered in a topical dropper, this formulation targets the scalp or skin directly for localized effect.
medications.indication:
This blend is used to support hair restoration and scalp health at the cellular level, particularly in individuals with inflammation-driven or androgen-sensitive hair loss.

GHK-Cu promotes angiogenesis, collagen production, and follicular regeneration, helping extend the growth (anagen) phase of hair
Zinc thymulin supports immune modulation and may help reduce inflammatory signaling that contributes to follicle miniaturization
Zinc also plays a role in balancing 5-alpha-reductase activity, offering mild support in reducing DHT impact locally

Indicated for:

Androgenic alopecia (male or female pattern hair loss)
Thinning hair associated with inflammation or poor scalp health
Supporting recovery of hair follicles in combination with systemic or other topical therapies

supplements.name: Saw Palmetto
supplements.description: Saw Palmetto (Serenoa repens) is a botanical extract derived from the berries of a small palm tree traditionally used to support hormonal balance and prostate health.
supplements.indication: Saw palmetto is commonly used as a natural 5-alpha-reductase inhibitor, meaning it helps reduce the conversion of testosterone into dihydrotestosterone (DHT)—a more potent androgen associated with conditions like androgenic alopecia (hair loss), acne, and benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH).

supplements.name: L-Glutamine
supplements.description: L-Glutamine is a conditionally essential amino acid that serves as a primary fuel source for enterocytes (intestinal lining cells) and plays a key role in maintaining gut integrity, immune function, and cellular repair. In functional medicine, it is commonly used to support the health of the gastrointestinal barrier and promote recovery from inflammation or stress-related depletion.
supplements.indication: L-glutamine is indicated to help repair and strengthen the gut lining, reduce intestinal permeability (“leaky gut”), and support overall digestive and immune health. By improving nutrient absorption and lowering systemic inflammation, it can also indirectly support hormonal balance and optimize the body’s response to therapies aimed at addressing androgen-related concerns.

supplements.name: Iron
supplements.description: Iron is an essential trace mineral required for hemoglobin formation, oxygen transport, and cellular energy production. In functional medicine, iron status is evaluated not just by serum iron but in the context of ferritin, transferrin saturation, and overall inflammatory status, as iron plays a critical role in energy, cognitive function, and hair follicle cycling.
supplements.indication: Iron is indicated for the support of optimal oxygen delivery, energy production, and healthy red blood cell formation, particularly when labs suggest low iron availability contributing to fatigue, hair shedding, or poor recovery. Restoring adequate iron stores can also support thyroid function and hair growth, both of which are commonly impacted when iron status is suboptimal.

supplements.indication: Omega-3s help reduce systemic inflammation, protect cardiovascular health, and improve joint mobility.

GHK-Cu promotes angiogenesis, collagen production, and follicular regeneration, helping extend the growth (anagen) phase of hair
Zinc thymulin supports immune modulation and may help reduce inflammatory signaling that contributes to follicle miniaturization
Zinc also plays a role in balancing 5-alpha-reductase activity, offering mild support in reducing DHT impact locally

Indicated for:

Androgenic alopecia (male or female pattern hair loss)
Thinning hair associated with inflammation or poor scalp health
Supporting recovery of hair follicles in combination with systemic or other topical therapies

medications.name: Spironolactone
medications.description: Spironolactone is a potassium-sparing diuretic with anti-androgen properties that works by blocking androgen receptors and reducing the effects of hormones like testosterone and DHT at the tissue level. While originally developed for fluid balance and blood pressure support, it is widely used in functional and integrative care for its ability to modulate androgen activity systemically.
medications.indication: Indicated for individuals with signs of androgen excess or sensitivity, spironolactone is used to help reduce DHT-driven symptoms such as hormonal acne, androgenic hair loss, and unwanted hair growth. It is often considered when a stronger, systemic approach is needed to complement or go beyond natural DHT-modulating therapies.

supplements.name: Saw Palmetto
supplements.description: Saw Palmetto (Serenoa repens) is a botanical extract derived from the berries of a small palm tree traditionally used to support hormonal balance and prostate health.
supplements.indication: Saw palmetto is commonly used as a natural 5-alpha-reductase inhibitor, meaning it helps reduce the conversion of testosterone into dihydrotestosterone (DHT)—a more potent androgen associated with conditions like androgenic alopecia (hair loss), acne, and benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH).

supplements.name: L-Glutamine
supplements.description: L-Glutamine is a conditionally essential amino acid that serves as a primary fuel source for enterocytes (intestinal lining cells) and plays a key role in maintaining gut integrity, immune function, and cellular repair. In functional medicine, it is commonly used to support the health of the gastrointestinal barrier and promote recovery from inflammation or stress-related depletion.
supplements.indication: L-glutamine is indicated to help repair and strengthen the gut lining, reduce intestinal permeability (“leaky gut”), and support overall digestive and immune health. By improving nutrient absorption and lowering systemic inflammation, it can also indirectly support hormonal balance and optimize the body’s response to therapies aimed at addressing androgen-related concerns.

supplements.name: Iron
supplements.description: Iron is an essential trace mineral required for hemoglobin formation, oxygen transport, and cellular energy production. In functional medicine, iron status is evaluated not just by serum iron but in the context of ferritin, transferrin saturation, and overall inflammatory status, as iron plays a critical role in energy, cognitive function, and hair follicle cycling.
supplements.indication: Iron is indicated for the support of optimal oxygen delivery, energy production, and healthy red blood cell formation, particularly when labs suggest low iron availability contributing to fatigue, hair shedding, or poor recovery. Restoring adequate iron stores can also support thyroid function and hair growth, both of which are commonly impacted when iron status is suboptimal.

supplements.name: Omega-3
supplements.description: A fatty acid supplement derived from fish oil, providing EPA and DHA for heart health, brain function, and anti-inflammatory support.
supplements.indication: Omega-3s help reduce systemic inflammation, protect cardiovascular health, and improve joint mobility.

supplements.name: Vitamin D
supplements.description: A critical vitamin for bone health, immune function, and mood regulation.
supplements.indication: Support your overall health with Vitamin D3, essential for strong bones, a robust immune system, and optimal mood.

medications.description: This compounded topical combines zinc thymulin, a bioactive peptide complex that supports immune signaling and tissue regulation, with GHK-Cu (copper peptide), a well-studied regenerative peptide known for its role in skin remodeling, wound healing, and hair follicle stimulation. Delivered in a topical dropper, this formulation targets the scalp or skin directly for localized effect.

supplements.name: Saccharomyces boulardii
supplements.description: Saccharomyces boulardii is a non-pathogenic, transient probiotic yeast that supports gut microbial balance and intestinal resilience. In functional medicine, it is valued for its ability to help reinforce the gut barrier, support immune modulation within the GI tract, and promote a healthier microbial environment without permanently colonizing the gut.
supplements.indication: Indicated to support gut microbiome balance, intestinal barrier integrity, and digestive resilience, particularly in individuals with dysbiosis, loose stools, antibiotic exposure, or inflammatory gut patterns. It is often used as part of gut-healing protocols to reduce gastrointestinal irritation and support immune function within the digestive tract.

supplements.name: Digestive Enzymes
supplements.description: Digestive Enzymes are a blend of enzymes such as proteases, lipases, and amylases that assist in the breakdown of proteins, fats, and carbohydrates to improve nutrient absorption. In functional medicine, they are used to support optimal digestion, reduce post-meal bloating, and decrease the burden on endogenous enzyme production.
supplements.indication: Indicated to support efficient digestion and nutrient absorption, particularly in individuals experiencing bloating, fullness, or malabsorption symptoms. They are often used in gut repair protocols to optimize digestive function, improve tolerance to food intake, and support overall gastrointestinal recovery.

It neutralizes harmful free radicals, reduces oxidative stress, and supports liver health, making it essential for overall wellness and anti-aging.
medications.indication: Glutathione helps brighten skin tone, reduce inflammation, and enhance recovery from physical stress. Widely studied for its benefits, it is a cornerstone of cellular defense and optimal health.

medications.description: Oxandrolone Therapy offers a powerful solution for enhancing recovery, strength, and lean muscle preservation during your TRT journey. Its mild profile and targeted benefits make it an ideal addition to testosterone replacement therapy, helping you recover faster, maintain muscle integrity.

supplements.name: Psyllium Husk
supplements.description: Psyllium Husk is a natural, soluble fiber supplement that promotes healthy digestion, regularity, and supports heart health by helping to maintain healthy cholesterol levels.
supplements.indication: Promotes digestive health and regularity while supporting heart health with gentle, natural fiber.

tests.name: Prolactin
tests.description: Prolactin is a hormone produced by the pituitary gland that primarily supports breast development and milk production, but from a functional medicine perspective, it also acts as a sensitive marker of the hypothalamic-pituitary axis and overall stress response. It is closely influenced by dopamine (which suppresses prolactin), meaning elevations can reflect reduced dopaminergic tone, chronic stress, poor sleep, or certain medications. Prolactin also interacts with sex hormones, and even mild elevations—within “normal” lab ranges—can contribute to subtle hormonal imbalances, including suppression of ovulation, progesterone, and testosterone.
tests.indication: Prolactin is evaluated to assess underlying drivers of hormone imbalance, particularly when patients present with symptoms like irregular cycles, low libido, infertility, or signs of low testosterone or progesterone. Functionally, a level above optimal (often considered >10 ng/mL, even if still “normal”) may prompt further investigation into stress physiology, dopamine balance, thyroid function, or potential pituitary involvement. Persistent elevations may warrant retesting.

medications.name: Thymosin Alpha-1
medications.description: Thymosin Alpha-1 (TA-1) is an immune-modulating peptide derived from the thymus that helps regulate and rebalance immune function rather than simply stimulating it. It enhances T-cell activity, improves immune surveillance, and modulates inflammatory signaling, making it particularly useful in states of immune dysregulation. In the gut, it supports the gut-associated immune system (GALT), helping reduce inappropriate immune reactions to microbes and food antigens while creating a more favorable environment for mucosal healing and microbiome balance.
medications.indication: TA-1 is best indicated in patients with chronic, immune-driven gut dysfunction—such as intestinal permeability (“leaky gut”), dysbiosis, SIBO recurrence, or inflammatory bowel conditions—especially when there is a pattern of persistent inflammation alongside poor pathogen clearance. It is most useful when gut issues are not resolving with standard antimicrobial and repair protocols, suggesting underlying immune imbalance that requires modulation to restore resilience and prevent relapse.

medications.description: A selective estrogen receptor modulator (SERM) used to increase testosterone production in men by stimulating the natural production of luteinizing hormone (LH) and follicle-stimulating hormone (FSH).
medications.indication: A powerful testosterone booster that enhances natural production while supporting fertility. Unlike traditional options, Enclomiphene helps maintain testicular function and sperm count, ensuring optimized hormone levels without compromising reproductive health.

medications.name: Ezetimibe
medications.description: Ezetimibe is a cholesterol-lowering medication that significantly reduces LDL-C while boosting HDL-C, offering additional protective benefits for heart health, non-alcoholic fatty liver disease, and stroke prevention. It also helps lower inflammation by reducing CRP levels, supporting overall cardiovascular wellness.
medications.indication: Lowers bad cholesterol (LDL-C), raises good cholesterol (HDL-C), and supports heart and liver health while reducing inflammation.

medications.name: MOTS-c
medications.description: MOTS-c is a mitochondrial-derived peptide composed of 16 amino acids, encoded within the mitochondrial genome. It regulates metabolic homeostasis, cellular energy production, and mitochondrial function by activating AMPK (AMP-activated protein kinase), a critical energy-sensing enzyme involved in cellular metabolism, insulin sensitivity, fat oxidation, and glucose uptake.
medications.indication: Supports metabolic health, enhances mitochondrial function, and improves energy production. Indicated for patients with metabolic dysfunction, insulin resistance, weight loss resistance, or chronic fatigue. MOTS-c improves glucose utilization, increases fat oxidation, reduces inflammation, and supports healthy aging and exercise recovery.

medications.name: TB-400 / TB-500
medications.description: TB-400/500 is a synthetic fragment of thymosin beta-4 (specifically the 17-23 segment), designed to replicate its active region. Both are involved in actin regulation and tissue repair. TB-500 Therapy provides advanced treatment designed to enhance recovery, promote healing, and support overall physical performance.
medications.indication: TB-400/500 therapy helps reduce inflammation, accelerate tissue repair, and improve endurance, making it an ideal choice for those seeking optimal recovery and resilience.

supplements.name: Inositol
supplements.description: Inositol—particularly myo-inositol and D-chiro-inositol—is a vitamin-like compound that plays a key role in insulin signaling and cellular glucose uptake. It acts as a secondary messenger that helps improve how cells respond to insulin, supporting more efficient transport of glucose out of the bloodstream and into tissues. It also influences pathways related to lipid metabolism, neurotransmitters, and hormone balance, making it especially useful in conditions where metabolic and endocrine systems overlap.
supplements.indication: Inositol is commonly used to support blood sugar regulation in individuals with insulin resistance, metabolic syndrome, or conditions like PCOS where glucose dysregulation is a core driver. May be indicated when fasting glucose, insulin, or HbA1c trends are elevated, or when there are signs of impaired insulin sensitivity such as low SHBG or increased abdominal adiposity. It can help improve insulin efficiency, reduce postprandial glucose spikes, and support downstream hormonal balance, often serving as a gentle, well-tolerated adjunct to nutrition and lifestyle interventions aimed at stabilizing blood sugar.

tests.name: DUTCH Complete™ Test
tests.description: The DUTCH Complete™ Test (Dried Urine Test for Comprehensive Hormones) is an advanced hormone panel that provides a detailed analysis of sex hormones, adrenal function, and their metabolites. Using dried urine samples collected over a 24-hour period, this test offers a comprehensive assessment of hormonal balance, metabolism, and overall endocrine health. It measures cortisol patterns, sex hormones, melatonin, and organic acid markers to provide insights into stress response, hormone detoxification, and overall well-being.
tests.indication: The DUTCH Complete™ Test is indicated for individuals experiencing symptoms related to hormone imbalance, adrenal dysfunction, and metabolic concerns, including fatigue, mood swings, weight fluctuations, irregular menstrual cycles, low libido, and sleep disturbances. It is particularly beneficial for assessing adrenal health, evaluating estrogen metabolism, and monitoring hormone therapy. This test provides actionable insights for optimizing hormonal balance, improving stress resilience, and enhancing overall wellness.

tests.name: DUTCH Complete™ Test
tests.description: The DUTCH Complete™ Test (Dried Urine Test for Comprehensive Hormones) is an advanced hormone panel that provides a detailed analysis of sex hormones, adrenal function, and their metabolites. Using dried urine samples collected over a 24-hour period, this test offers a comprehensive assessment of hormonal balance, metabolism, and overall endocrine health. It measures cortisol patterns, sex hormones, melatonin, and organic acid markers to provide insights into stress response, hormone detoxification, and overall well-being.
tests.indication: The DUTCH Complete™ Test is indicated for individuals experiencing symptoms related to hormone imbalance, adrenal dysfunction, and metabolic concerns, including fatigue, mood swings, weight fluctuations, irregular menstrual cycles, low libido, and sleep disturbances. It is particularly beneficial for assessing adrenal health, evaluating estrogen metabolism, and monitoring hormone therapy. This test provides actionable insights for optimizing hormonal balance, improving stress resilience, and enhancing overall wellness.

supplements.name: Green Tea
supplements.description: Green tea extract is a concentrated source of antioxidants, particularly catechins like EGCG, derived from the leaves of the Camellia sinensis plant. These compounds help reduce oxidative stress, support metabolic health, and promote overall cellular function. In addition to its antioxidant benefits, green tea extract contains a natural combination of caffeine and L-theanine, which work synergistically to improve alertness and mental clarity without the typical jitters or crashes associated with stimulants.
supplements.indication: Recommended for individuals looking to support healthy weight management, improve focus and energy, and promote cardiovascular and metabolic health. Its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties also make it beneficial for those seeking additional protection against the effects of chronic stress and aging.

medications.indication: May fit patients who feel stuck with weight loss, cravings, constant hunger, blood-sugar swings, or insulin-resistance patterns. Requires dose titration, side-effect monitoring, and contraindication screening.

medications.name: Testosterone Cypionate in GSO

supplements.name: L-Theanine
supplements.description: L-Theanine is a naturally occurring amino acid found in green and black tea leaves. It promotes relaxation without causing drowsiness, making it ideal for stress relief and mental focus. Known for its calming effects, it may also enhance cognitive performance, reduce anxiety, and improve sleep quality.
supplements.indication: Recommended for individuals seeking to reduce stress, enhance focus, or improve sleep patterns. It is particularly useful for managing everyday anxiety and promoting a sense of calm while maintaining alertness.

supplements.name: Green Tea
supplements.description: Green tea extract is a concentrated source of antioxidants, particularly catechins like EGCG, derived from the leaves of the Camellia sinensis plant. These compounds help reduce oxidative stress, support metabolic health, and promote overall cellular function. In addition to its antioxidant benefits, green tea extract contains a natural combination of caffeine and L-theanine, which work synergistically to improve alertness and mental clarity without the typical jitters or crashes associated with stimulants.
supplements.indication: Recommended for individuals looking to support healthy weight management, improve focus and energy, and promote cardiovascular and metabolic health. Its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties also make it beneficial for those seeking additional protection against the effects of chronic stress and aging.

tests.name: Women's Comprehensive Hormone Health Panel
tests.description: An extensive hormone panel covering key markers affecting female energy, mood, reproductive health, and metabolic function.
tests.indication: Includes Total & Free Testosterone (LC/MS), Estradiol (LC/MS), SHBG, Progesterone, Prolactin, Cortisol, LH, FSH, DHEA-S, TSH, Free T3, Free T4, IGF-1, Lipid Panel, ApoB, Lipoprotein (a), Ferritin, HbA1c, CBC, Metabolic Panel, Fasting Insulin, GGT, Vitamin D, Iron Panel, and hsCRP.

tests.name: GI-MAP (GI Microbial Assay Plus)
tests.description: A detailed stool analysis assessing gut bacteria, viruses, parasites, fungi, and key inflammatory markers.
tests.indication: Provides actionable insights into gut health for individuals experiencing digestive discomfort, immune challenges, or systemic inflammation.

tests.name: DUTCH Complete™ Test
tests.description: The DUTCH Complete™ Test (Dried Urine Test for Comprehensive Hormones) is an advanced hormone panel that provides a detailed analysis of sex hormones, adrenal function, and their metabolites. Using dried urine samples collected over a 24-hour period, this test offers a comprehensive assessment of hormonal balance, metabolism, and overall endocrine health. It measures cortisol patterns, sex hormones, melatonin, and organic acid markers to provide insights into stress response, hormone detoxification, and overall well-being.
tests.indication: The DUTCH Complete™ Test is indicated for individuals experiencing symptoms related to hormone imbalance, adrenal dysfunction, and metabolic concerns, including fatigue, mood swings, weight fluctuations, irregular menstrual cycles, low libido, and sleep disturbances. It is particularly beneficial for assessing adrenal health, evaluating estrogen metabolism, and monitoring hormone therapy. This test provides actionable insights for optimizing hormonal balance, improving stress resilience, and enhancing overall wellness.

tests.name: Men's TRT Treatment Follow-Up Panel
tests.description: A targeted follow-up panel designed for men undergoing hormone therapy, tracking key changes in testosterone and overall health.
tests.indication: Measures Free & Total Testosterone, Estradiol, PSA, CBC, and Metabolic Panel.

medications.name: Testosterone Cypionate Injection (Grapeseed Oil)
medications.dosing: EMP-2: 200 mg/ml; 10 ml; EMP-4: 150 mg/ml; 5 ml; EMP-171: 200 mg/ml; 5 ml
medications.description: A testosterone therapy option used in clinician-guided hormone care to restore testosterone to a healthier range when symptoms and lab results support treatment.
medications.indication: May fit men dealing with low energy, low libido, weaker workouts, loss of muscle, mood changes, poor recovery, or other symptoms that line up with low testosterone labs. Treatment requires ongoing monitoring.

medications.name: DHEA Capsule SR
medications.dosing: EMP-62: 20 mg; EMP-64: 50 mg; EMP-66: 100 mg; EMP-270: 10 mg; EMP-271: 5 mg; zao-260: (T2); 10 mg; ZAO-317: (Compounded); (T2); 5 mg
medications.description: A hormone-precursor therapy used to support downstream hormone production, stress resilience, energy, and neuroendocrine balance when levels are low or suboptimal.
medications.indication: May fit patients with fatigue, stress sensitivity, low resilience, mood changes, low libido, or hormone-marker patterns suggesting low DHEA or pregnenolone. Requires lab-guided use.
medications.sku: EMP-62; EMP-64; EMP-66; EMP-270; EMP-271; zao-260; ZAO-317

medications.description: A mitochondrial or longevity-focused therapy used in select clinician-guided protocols to support cellular energy, healthy aging, and metabolic resilience.
medications.indication: May fit patients dealing with low energy, poor recovery, brain fog, metabolic stress, or age-related performance decline. Many therapies in this category require careful review because evidence and regulatory status vary.

medications.name: Metformin ER Tablet

medications.indication: May fit patients struggling with appetite, cravings, weight-loss resistance, insulin resistance, or metabolic markers that are not improving with lifestyle alone. Requires individualized risk review.

supplements.name: Selenium
supplements.description: Selenium is essential for thyroid function as it helps convert inactive thyroid hormone (T4) into its active form (T3) and protects the thyroid gland from oxidative damage through its role in antioxidant enzymes like glutathione peroxidase. A deficiency in selenium can impair thyroid hormone metabolism and increase the risk of thyroid disorders, including hypothyroidism and Hashimoto’s thyroiditis.
supplements.indication: Selenium is indicated for individuals seeking to support healthy immune function, protect normal cell activity from oxidative stress, and promote overall cardiovascular and cellular health.

supplements.name: Green Tea
supplements.description: Green tea extract is a concentrated source of antioxidants, particularly catechins like EGCG, derived from the leaves of the Camellia sinensis plant. In addition to its antioxidant benefits, green tea extract contains a natural combination of caffeine and L-theanine, which work synergistically to improve alertness and mental clarity without the typical jitters or crashes associated with stimulants.
supplements.indication: Recommended for individuals looking to support healthy weight management, improve focus and energy, and promote cardiovascular and metabolic health. supplements.name: Homocysteine Nutrients
supplements.description: Homocysteine Nutrients is a dietary supplement designed to support healthy homocysteine metabolism and optimal methylation. It combines bioactive B vitamins, such as L-methylfolate and methylcobalamin, with trimethylglycine (TMG) to promote cardiovascular and neurological health. This formula helps convert homocysteine to methionine, maintaining normal levels for improved function.
supplements.indication: High Homocysteine blood plasma levels, also supports cardiovascular and cognitive health by promoting the efficient metabolism of homocysteine, a key factor in reducing health risks.

supplements.name: Complete Commensal Probiotic - DFH
supplements.description:
Introducing Complete Commensal Probiotic™, the future of probiotic care. Keystone commensals
are pivotal, irreplaceable bacterial strains in your gut microbiome that support a wide range of
functions for foundational health. However, modern life can strip away the keystone bacteria your
gut was designed to have. Many probiotics pass through – but don’t rebuild these lost bacteria
supplements.indication:
• A. muciniphila – Supports a strong gut lining by helping maintain the protective
mucus layer and a balanced gut microbiome.* Also plays a unique role in
helping promote normal appetite and body composition.*
• B. adolescentis – Helps the gut microbiome work well together while
supporting immune health, mood, and sleep.*
• B. longum – Supports brain health and a positive mood, including memory and
problem-solving.*
• F. prausnitzii – Helps keep the gut calm and balanced by supporting a healthy
gut lining and balanced immune response.*
• R. intestinalis – Supports gut repair and a healthy gut barrier while promoting
balanced immune and inflammatory responses.*

tests.name: DUTCH Complete™ Test
tests.description: The DUTCH Complete™ Test (Dried Urine Test for Comprehensive Hormones) is an advanced hormone panel that provides a detailed analysis of sex hormones, adrenal function, and their metabolites. Using dried urine samples collected over a 24-hour period, this test offers a comprehensive assessment of hormonal balance, metabolism, and overall endocrine health. It measures cortisol patterns, sex hormones, melatonin, and organic acid markers to provide insights into stress response, hormone detoxification, and overall well-being.
tests.indication: The DUTCH Complete™ Test is indicated for individuals experiencing symptoms related to hormone imbalance, adrenal dysfunction, and metabolic concerns, including fatigue, mood swings, weight fluctuations, irregular menstrual cycles, low libido, and sleep disturbances. It is particularly beneficial for assessing adrenal health, evaluating estrogen metabolism, and monitoring hormone therapy. This test provides actionable insights for optimizing hormonal balance, improving stress resilience, and enhancing overall wellness.

In addition to its antioxidant benefits, green tea extract contains a natural combination of caffeine and L-theanine, which work synergistically to improve alertness and mental clarity without the typical jitters or crashes associated with stimulants.
supplements.indication: Recommended for individuals looking to support healthy weight management, improve focus and energy, and promote cardiovascular and metabolic health. medications.description: A GLP-1 or incretin-based therapy used in medically supervised weight-management and metabolic-health programs. These medications help regulate appetite, satiety, and glucose response.
medications.indication: May fit patients who feel stuck with weight loss, cravings, constant hunger, blood-sugar swings, or insulin-resistance patterns. Requires dose titration, side-effect monitoring, and contraindication screening.

supplements.name: Berberine
supplements.description: A natural compound derived from plants that supports blood sugar regulation and metabolic health.
supplements.indication: Nature's powerful metabolic optimizer. Known for its ability to support healthy blood sugar levels, improve insulin sensitivity, and promote fat metabolism.

Optimize your wellness with these foundational nutrients!
supplements.indication: Designed to support bone strength, immune function, heart health, and overall vitality.

tests.name: GI-MAP + Zonulin
tests.description: An advanced stool test providing a comprehensive assessment of gut microbiome health, including pathogens, inflammation markers, and intestinal permeability (zonulin).
tests.indication: Ideal for those addressing gut issues, digestive health, or immune function concerns.

supplements.name: Green Tea
supplements.description: Green tea extract is a concentrated source of antioxidants, particularly catechins like EGCG, derived from the leaves of the Camellia sinensis plant. These compounds help reduce oxidative stress, support metabolic health, and promote overall cellular function. In addition to its antioxidant benefits, green tea extract contains a natural combination of caffeine and L-theanine, which work synergistically to improve alertness and mental clarity without the typical jitters or crashes associated with stimulants.
supplements.indication: Recommended for individuals looking to support healthy weight management, improve focus and energy, and promote cardiovascular and metabolic health. Its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties also make it beneficial for those seeking additional protection against the effects of chronic stress and aging.
